name: InputBase.story
visual_summary: InputBase.story is a input base story UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable input behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: InputBase.story
Description: InputBase.story is a input base story UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable input behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: base, input, mantine, story

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/InputBase/InputBase.story.tsx
import { InputBase } from './InputBase';

export default { title: 'InputBase' };

export function WithinDisabledFieldset() {
  return (
    <fieldset disabled style={{ padding: 40 }}>
      <legend>Disabled fieldset</legend>
      <InputBase label="Disabled by fieldset" placeholder="Disabled by fieldset" />
      <InputBase label="Disabled by prop" placeholder="Disabled by prop" disabled mt="md" />
    </fieldset>
  );
}
